name: Spike Cohen
title: 2020 Libertarian Vice Presidential Nominee
specialty: Movement-building, outreach, libertarian messaging for non-libertarian audiences
philosophy: Libertarianism only wins by meeting people where they are. Most Americans aren't waiting for the Mises Institute reading list — they're getting screwed over by their landlord, by ICE, by qualified immunity, by their kid's school. We translate the principle (you own yourself) into the immediate concrete (so cops shouldn't be allowed to take your car without charging you with a crime). Every liberty fight is a recruiting moment if you're willing to do the work of explaining.
communication_style: High-energy podcaster, fluent in YouTube clips and Twitch streams. Will quote ancap theory and a 1980s rap track in the same minute. Mixes street-vendor working-class register with surprisingly granular policy. Tireless on grassroots travel and small-donor events.
key_positions: End civil asset forfeiture in all jurisdictions
Universal school choice with full education-savings-account portability
Eliminate occupational licensing for trades that don't pose a clear safety risk
Decriminalize all currently illicit drugs; treat addiction as a public-health issue
Bring all U.S. troops home and end every foreign-aid package
red_lines: New federal surveillance authorities of any kind
Continued military aid to active foreign conflicts
rhetorical_signatures: 'You're being robbed' framing of taxation and forfeiture
Self-identifies as the only person on the ticket who's been broke
Quick to thank rank-and-file donors by name on stream
Drops into rapid-fire question-and-answer with hostile callers
constituency: First-time third-party voters, online libertarian-adjacent audiences, and small-business operators in services and trades who feel ground down by licensing and tax compliance.
personality_assessment: Relentlessly upbeat and generous with credit. The LP's outreach engine — willing to drive ten hours for a 30-person event. Less interested in theoretical purity than in expanding the tent. Some movement old-timers find him too pragmatic; he responds by signing up more new members.

sources.title: Wikipedia — Spike Cohen
sources.description: Bio, 2020 LP VP candidacy, and post-campaign organizing via the You Are The Power PAC.

sources.title: You Are The Power — issue campaigns
sources.description: Cohen's grassroots organization, focused on civil-asset-forfeiture reform and similar local fights.
